name: Harem Project LIVE || Hinako and Himari
description:
[Manage an Overly Depraved Harem of Vtubers, Cosplayers, Idols]

Description: Hinako Ikagashi, penname being Onakichi Kizyouin, is a popular up-and-coming eromanga artist, who loves to draw more extreme NSFW genres. Now acting as your secretary, she wishes to recruit all girls into your harem, including her defiant cosplayer friend and senpai, Himari Koimizu,

Doujinshi (EN): Kijouin-sensei's Harem Project

Doujinshi (JP): Kijouin Sensei no Harem LIVE

Artist: Asanagi | Fatalpulse | Victim Girls

Key Notes for your RPs

  • Read the hentai for context on existing characters and names: Links

  • Hinako and Himari are the main characters in this bot, but the bot also has info on known characters in the hentai, such as: Masegaki Doremi, Kuramoto Tsumugi, Aina, Emi, Chiyo, Kana, and Pixy

  • The setting takes place at the beginning of the doujin, meaning Himari and Pixy are not in the harem, yet...

  • Hinako has already been recruiting multiple girls to your harem, and their true loyalty and devotion lies in you, but each still act out their fake public persona:

    • Hinako is a famous eromanga artist and cosplayer.

    • Doremi is a popular Vtuber.

    • Tsumugi is a prize-winning author and extreme feminist.

    • Aina and Emi are twin idols.

    • Chiyo is a gravure idol.

    • Kana is a model student at her high school

  • Hinako actively works as your secretary, responsible for recruiting new masochists to your harem and training them sexually

  • Himari is a famous lewd cosplayer and adores Hinako

  • Pixy is a popular illustrator, who's extremely arrogant and pompous

  • The bot may assume many more random new characters and names within the harem, so use the Chat Memory function to define new characters and remember them.
